hero_description: Readya is a platform that easily converts any text into audio.
feature_ai_desc: Short, clear summaries. Only the essential information with quick access to key ideas
feature_voice_desc: Adjust reading speed, choose voice tone, and highlight text while listening
feature_save_desc: Access information on the go, use bookmarks and mark important sections
feature_listen_desc: Short, clear summaries. Only the essential information with quick access to key ideas
feature_download_desc: Save audio files for offline listening. Listen without internet connection
testimonial_1_text: Working with large volumes of study materials has become much easier with Readya. Listening to text allows me to manage my time more efficiently.
testimonial_2_text: In my workflow, I often need to go through a large number of documents. Readya helps make this process more flexible and efficient.
testimonial_3_text: Managing time effectively is important during exam preparation. Readya allows me to listen to study materials anytime.
